varieties.name: Atherton Raspberry
varieties.origin: Australia/Papua New Guinea (indigenous to Northern Australia)
varieties.traits: 🌱 Open-pollinated, 🌏 Indigenous; Vigorous scrambling shrub, bright red berries, smaller than commercial raspberries
varieties.yield_notes: Very productive, can produce up to 3kg per season, year-round fruiting possible
varieties.availability: Daleys Fruit Trees, Tucker Bush, Australian native plant nurseries, Lamington Native Nursery

varieties.name: Heritage
varieties.traits: 🧬 Hybrid (European x American subspecies), Primocane; Upright vigorous canes to 1.5m, disease-resistant, heat tolerant
varieties.yield_notes: Very productive, 8-12 week picking period from February onwards

varieties.name: Chilcotin
varieties.traits: 🌱 Open-pollinated, Floricane; Sturdy almost thornless canes, good disease resistance
varieties.yield_notes: Heavy cropper, double cropping possible with small autumn crop on tips
varieties.availability: The Diggers Club, Tesselaar, The Seed Collection, Tasmanian Raspberry Canes

varieties.name: Chilliwack
varieties.traits: 🌱 Open-pollinated, Floricane; Almost thornless, tall straight canes, low chill requirement
varieties.yield_notes: High yielding, mid-summer with possible autumn crop
varieties.availability: Daleys Fruit Trees, The Diggers Club, Tesselaar, Heritage Fruit Trees, Tasmanian Raspberry Canes

varieties.name: Willamette
varieties.origin: USA, Oregon, 1940s-1950s (once most widely planted raspberry worldwide)
varieties.traits: 🏆 Heirloom, Floricane; Vigorous tall canes to 3m, some virus resistance
varieties.yield_notes: Prolific producer, mid-June to early July harvest, dual cropping on first and second year canes

varieties.name: Autumn Bliss
varieties.traits: 🧬 Hybrid, Primocane, Plant Breeder's Rights; Compact sturdy canes to 1.2m, excellent disease resistance, no support needed
varieties.yield_notes: Very productive, August to October fruiting, long season

varieties.name: Tulameen
varieties.origin: Canada, British Columbia, 1989 (Nootka x Glen Prosen cross)
varieties.traits: 🌱 Open-pollinated, Floricane; Upright thornless canes to 2m, world-leading fresh market variety
varieties.yield_notes: Extremely high, longest fruiting season of summer varieties (50 days), late summer harvest
varieties.availability: The Diggers Club, Australian Plants Online, Garden Express, Daleys Fruit Trees

varieties.name: Mysore Raspberry
varieties.origin: India (Himalayan foothills - Bhutan, India, Nepal), native species
varieties.traits: 🌱 Open-pollinated, 🌏 Indigenous to India; Scrambling shrub 1-2.5m, whitish tomentose stems, thorny, red-purple colored stems
varieties.yield_notes: Productive, can produce throughout growing season in tropical climates
varieties.availability: Eureka Farms, local Kerala nurseries, Veliyath Gardens, Indian agricultural universities

varieties.name: Himalayan Raspberry (Yellow/Golden)
varieties.origin: India (Himalayan region - Himachal Pradesh, Uttarakhand, J&K)
varieties.traits: 🌱 Open-pollinated, 🌏 Indigenous to Indian subcontinent; Large evergreen shrub to 4.5m, thorny stems, white flowers
varieties.yield_notes: Productive in suitable climates, February-April flowering
varieties.availability: Kerala Forest Research Institute, local hill station nurseries, traditional growers

varieties.name: West Indian Raspberry
varieties.origin: India, Southeast Asia, naturalized widely in tropics
varieties.traits: 🌱 Open-pollinated, 🌏 Indigenous to tropical Asia; Subshrub 1-2m height, prickly stems, white flowers, rose-like leaves
varieties.yield_notes: Year-round fruiting in tropics, peak June-October
varieties.availability: Wild foraging, local tropical plant nurseries, naturalized populations

varieties.name: Heritage (International)
varieties.traits: 🧬 Hybrid, Primocane; Upright canes, disease-resistant, heat tolerant
varieties.availability: Specialty nurseries, Farm2Fam (Pune), high-altitude agricultural stations
